title: Filipino Chicken Curry
description: A twist on the classic curry recipe, incorporating the flavors of the Philippines with a tangy citrusy twist.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In the same pan, add the curry paste and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
4. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic and cook until softened.
5. Add the citrusy and heavy cream, stir to combine.
6. Return the cooked chicken to the pan and stir to coat with the curry sauce.
7. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5-10 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
8. Serve hot garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions.
